notes: Elevation overlap fix (built on the never-deployed v1.6.56 faceplate base, folded in). The faceplate rows were colliding with the U-number columns on both edges: the chassis bay was inset only 22px per side, but the number columns occupy 32-72px from each edge, so faceplate names (left) and type tags (right) rendered under the U numbers. Fixed by insetting the chassis bay to 76px per side - clearing the rail columns (0-30px) and the number columns (32-72px) with a small gap. Single CSS value change (.master-elev-chassis left/right 22px -> 76px); leaves ~238px of bay on a 390px phone. Audited: no other rule or JS references that offset. This version also carries the full v1.6.56 work (faceplate elevation, model-derived heights GB300 1U / H100-H200 8U, dynamic rack-U, type colors) since v1.6.56 was never deployed. Verified: JS parse OK, CSS balanced 2401/2401, real-renderer preview at 390px confirms no overlap.
